arts.ttl: Burnley players take stance against Milutin Osmajic before kick off amid racism allegations
arts.sum: An FA investigation is ongoing after Hannibal Mejbri alleged the striker made a racial remark when the sides met two weeks ago

arts.ttl: Burnley players refuse Osmajic handshake amid racism row
arts.sum: Burnley players decline to shake hands with Preston striker Milutin Osmajic before their FA Cup fifth-round tie amid a racism row between the two clubs.

arts.ttl: Brady scores for Preston with 'glorious' free-kick
arts.sum: Robert Brady scores a "glorious" free-kick to put Preston ahead in their fifth-round FA Cup tie.

arts.ttl: Burnley players ignore Osmajic after racist abuse accusations
arts.sum: Burnley players refuse to shake Milutin Osmajic's hand after teammate Hannibal Mejbri accused the Preston forward of racially abusing him the last time the two sides met.

arts.ttl: Burnley boss Scott Parker explains decision to leave out Hannibal for Preston North End FA Cup tie
arts.sum: Scott Parker has explained his decision to leave Hannibal out of Burnley’s squad for today’s FA Cup fifth round tie against Preston North End.

arts.ttl: 25 images of Burnley fans arriving at Deepdale for FA Cup fifth round tie against Preston North End
arts.sum: Following the 4-0 victory over Sheffield Wednesday at Turf Moor, the Clarets now turn their attention the the FA Cup and a short trip to Preston North End. Burnley fans will be hoping their side can advance to the quarter finals of the competition that they last won in 1914.

arts.ttl: Burnley team news for Preston North End FA Cup tie as Scott Parker makes Hannibal decision
arts.sum: Hannibal has been left out of Burnley’s squad for today’s FA Cup fifth round tie against Preston North End.

arts.ttl: How a Burnley version of hit BBC show The Traitors is fuelling the Clarets' bid for promotion
arts.sum: A claret spin on the TV show Traitors is helping fuel Burnley’s bid to earn promotion back to the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Preston North End v Burnley: Team news, predicted teams and TV details as Clarets bid to reach FA Cup quarter-finals
arts.sum: Burnley are just 90 minutes away from reaching the quarter finals of the FA Cup.

arts.ttl: Scott Parker lays out Burnley’s FA Cup ambitions ahead of Preston North End fifth round tie
arts.sum: A club outside of the usual suspects has a chance to go deep into the FA Cup this season – and why can’t it be Burnley?
